topic: GitHub Copilot Agentic Code Review: Automated PR Analysis in 2026

key_points: CodeRabbit charges $24/dev/month with 44% actionable feedback catch rate
Lower noise compared to Copilot's 5.1 average comments per review
Integrates directly into PR workflow with line-by-line suggestions
Greptile achieves 82% catch rate but generates higher noise
Specializes in understanding entire codebase context, not just diff
Better for catching architectural issues across files
Qodo (formerly CodiumAI) adds automated test generation alongside review
Focuses on test coverage gaps as part of code review
Integrates with CI/CD for automated quality gates
GitHub Copilot code review GA since March 5, 2026
Starting June 1, 2026: consumes GitHub Actions minutes billed as AI Credits
'Fix with Copilot' button (renamed from 'Implement suggestion') creates automated fix PRs
Passes suggestions to cloud agent for autonomous implementation
Shares premium request pool with other Copilot features

stats.fact: GitHub Copilot code review reached 60 million reviews processed by March 2026
71% of Copilot code reviews surface actionable feedback to developers
Average 5.1 comments per code review from Copilot
Starting June 1, 2026, Copilot code review consumes GitHub Actions minutes billed as AI Credits
CodeRabbit achieves 44% actionable feedback catch rate at $24/dev/month
Greptile achieves 82% catch rate but with higher noise ratio

angles: Step-by-step setup guide for enabling agentic Copilot code review on repositories
